description: Immediate need for a Paralegal for a position in the Telecom Industry. This is 09+ month’s contract opportunity with long-term potential located in Moorestown, NJ. Please review the job description below: Job ID: 18-13680 Key Responsibilities and Technology Experience: Classify and prioritize incoming legal requests (Court Orders) related to copyright infringement; prepare associated Legal Response Center workflow tickets for processing utilizing a proprietary ticketing system. Perform independent analysis of business records and identify Client subscribers associated with formal legal requests; Prepare, package and mail, subscriber communication within defined timelines. Respond to requests from subscribers in regards to their records such as IP History, call records, data logs. Perform quality control, verification, and formal analysis of legal correspondence and independently decide if information conforms to corporate guidelines for release to the requesting agency or subscriber. Answer / Respond to subscriber phone calls related to company correspondence and legal processes associated copyright orders and subscriber identification. Create formal legal case folders for copyright orders while performing file maintenance and provide dispositions on copyright related legal cases. Conduct thorough and detailed research using a wide variety of systems including billing and technical provisioning tools. Communicate with customers via telephone or email to ensure the verification of customer identity prior to the release of information as well as to answer questions, concerns, and provide follow up till resolution Manage ticket queue to resolve, follow up, and update with customer requests. Regular, consistent and punctual attendance. Must be able to work nights and weekends, variable schedule(s) and overtime as necessary. Other duties and responsibilities as assigned. Our client is a leading Telecom Industry and we are currently interviewing to fill this and other similar contract positions. Qualified candidates should apply online for immediate consideration.
